description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: converts port from the string '8080' to the integer 8080, and adds the missing log_level as 'info'. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: service/port/log_level are all required, additionalProperties is false, port must be an integer 1-65535, log_level must be one of debug/info/warn/error. Read output.json: port is the string '8080' (not an integer) and log_level is missing entirely. Converting port to the integer 8080 and adding log_level: 'info'.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
